_comment:
Canonical recipe for pure-broll-product-demo mode (PR #5). Drop this in as a starting storyboard.json, then customize.

IMPORTANT (post-Syncore feedback 2026-05-27): the meta-output beat (a QuickTime window opening to show 'the rendered video playing') is INTENTIONALLY ABSENT from this default. It's an opt-in beat ONLY for: (a) video / media-creation products where showing the artifact is the value prop, or (b) recursive self-demos (e.g., a video-generation skill showing itself running). For ordinary product launches it's a distracting beat that doesn't serve the narrative. If you need it, see references/meta-output-beat.md and add the segment manually.

The time budget here puts more weight on the actual product walkthrough (Scene B/C/D in the macbook scene) so the viewer understands what the product DOES, not what its rendered MP4 looks like.
_narrative_note: REPLACE every 'REPLACE:' placeholder below with real values for YOUR product. See references/narrative-arc.md (8 patterns). The auditor will block render if placeholders remain.

narrative.protagonist: REPLACE: who is the viewer / what role-and-situation
narrative.problem: REPLACE: specific friction this product solves
narrative.moment_of_magic: REPLACE: the one beat that produces 'oh, that's clever'
narrative.memorable_line: REPLACE: single sentence to remember 30s later
narrative.cta: REPLACE: where they go after (url, app store, etc)

_cast_note: Pattern 3 — named protagonist + 1-3 supporting cast. NO 'user' / 'viewer' allowed.
_canon_note: Pattern 1 — 3-5 SPECIFIC entities preserved across every frame. Proper nouns, not categories.

canon.primary_entity: REPLACE: the main artifact (e.g., 'Vertex Labs sync' meeting)
canon.other_party: REPLACE: who the protagonist interacts with
canon.central_quote: REPLACE: an exact quoted sentence that recurs
canon.key_doc: REPLACE: a specific document / file / artifact

_echo_note: Pattern 2 — pick ONE canon entity that recurs across 2+ frames in the same typography.

echo.treatment: REPLACE: e.g., 'italic serif quote, same typography'

_click_chain_note: Pattern 7 — UI products only. List clicks that trigger scene transitions. Skip if no clear UI.

narration.line: REPLACE: your opening line — sets the situation, not the product

segments.intent: First sight of the product. The MAGIC moment lives here.

narration.line: REPLACE: the line that introduces the product as the answer
REPLACE: the line that names what just got accomplished

segments.intent:
Continue the product walkthrough — a second concrete UI moment showing the outcome of the first beat. The 'promise kept' moment. Same MacBook, new UI state.

To make this the meta-output beat instead (QuickTime + multi-shot preview), see references/meta-output-beat.md.

narration.line: REPLACE: the memorable line. Reuse narrative.memorable_line.

narration.reason: let the wordmark land — no narration over a single brand mark
